title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Merck India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!
